revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:稲前神社]] {{Expand Japanese|稲前神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Inasaki Shrine | native_name = 稲前神社 | image = Okazaki-Inasaki-Jinja-1.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Inasaki Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.970121|137.182053}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu|ar|أماتيراسو|ary|أماطيراسو|az|Amaterasu|bcl|Amaterasu|be_x_old|Аматэрасу|be|Аматэрасу|bew|Amatérasu|bg|Аматерасу|ca|Amaterasu|cs|Amaterasu|da|Amaterasu|de|Amaterasu|el|Αματεράσου|en|Amaterasu|eo|Amaterasu|es|Amaterasu|et|Amaterasu|eu|Amaterasu|fa|آماتراسو|fi|Amaterasu|fr|Amaterasu|gl|Amaterasu|he|אמטראסו|hi|अमातेरसु|hr|Amaterasu|hu|Amateraszu Ómikami|hy|Ամատերասու Օմիկամի|id|Amaterasu|it|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|jaquote|アマテラス|jv|Amaterasu|ka|ამატერასუ|ko|아마테라스 오미카미|la|Amaterasu|lb|Amaterasu|lt|Amaterasu|lv|Amaterasu|min|Amaterasu|ml|അമതേരസു|mni|ꯑꯃꯇꯦꯔꯁꯨ ꯑꯣꯃꯤꯀꯃꯤ|ms|Amaterasu|nl|Amaterasu|nn|Amaterasu|no|Amaterasu|or|ଆମାତେରାଶୁ|pa|ਆਮਾਤੇਰਸ|pl|Amaterasu|pt|Amaterasu|ro|Amaterasu|ru|Аматэрасу|sco|Amaterasu|sh|Amaterasu|simple|Amaterasu Ōmikami|sk|Amaterasu Ómikami|sl|Amaterasu|sr|Аматерасу|su|Amaterasu|sv|Amaterasu|ta|அமதெரசு|th|อามาเตราซุ|tl|Amaterasu|tr|Amaterasu|uk|Аматерасу|uz|Amaterasu|vi|Amaterasu|wuu|天照大神|zh_min_nan|Amaterasu|zh_yue|天照大神|zh|天照大神|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} }} {{nihongo|'''Inasaki Shrine'''|稲前神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mikawa Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * Province|ja|三河国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11356190|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} ** Series ordinal: 8 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039571|ltq=Q135039571|qid=Q135039571|1=Haihō Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q28690200|ltq=Q28690200|qid=Q28690200|1=Atsuwa Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|lt=Okazaki|ar|أوكازاكي (آيتشي)|azb|اوکازاکی، آیچی|az|Okazaki|be|Акадзакі|bg|Окадзаки|ca|Okazaki|ceb|Okazaki (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Окадзаки|ckb|ئۆکازاکی، ئایچی|cs|Okazaki (Aiči)|de|Okazaki|en|Okazaki, Aichi|envoyage|Okazaki|eo|Okazaki|es|Okazaki (Aichi)|eu|Okazaki (Aichi)|fa|اوکازاکی|fi|Okazaki|fr|Okazaki|ga|Okazaki|gl|Okazaki|hr|Okazaki|hy|Օկաձակի|id|Okazaki|it|Okazaki (Aichi)|ja|岡崎市|javoyage|岡崎市|kk|Окадзаки|ko|오카자키시|lt|Okadzakis|mdf|Окадзаки|mg|Okazaki|ms|Okazaki, Aichi|mzn|اوکازاکی، آیچی|nl|Okazaki|no|Okazaki|pl|Okazaki|pt|Okazaki|ro|Okazaki|ru|Окадзаки|sh|Okazaki|simple|Okazaki, Aichi|sr|Оказаки|sv|Okazaki|tg|Оказаки|th|โอกาซากิ|tl|Okazaki|tr|Okazaki|tt|Окадзаки|uk|Окадзакі (Айті)|ur|اوکازاکی، ایچی|uz|Okazaki (Aichi)|vi|Okazaki, Aichi|war|Okazaki, Aichi|zh_classical|岡崎市|zh_min_nan|Okazaki-chhī|zh_yue|岡崎|zh|岡崎市|qid=Q242783|1=Okazaki, Aichi}} * {{ill|Q768158|ltq=Q768158|qid=Q768158|1=Mikawa Province}} * {{ill|Nukata District|lt=Nukata district|ceb|Nukata-gun|de|Nukata-gun|en|Nukata District|es|Distrito de Nukata (Aichi)|fa|شهرستان نوکاتا، آیچی|fr|District de Nukata|id|Distrik Nukata, Aichi|it|Distretto di Nukata|ja|額田郡|ko|누카타군|pl|Powiat Nukata|ru|Нуката (уезд)|sr|Област Нуката|tl|Distrito ng Nukata, Aichi|uk|Повіт Нуката|zh|額田郡|qid=Q787290|1=Nukata District}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.970121|137.182053}} == image (P18) == * Okazaki-Inasaki-Jinja-1.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu|ar|أماتيراسو|ary|أماطيراسو|az|Amaterasu|bcl|Amaterasu|be_x_old|Аматэрасу|be|Аматэрасу|bew|Amatérasu|bg|Аматерасу|ca|Amaterasu|cs|Amaterasu|da|Amaterasu|de|Amaterasu|el|Αματεράσου|en|Amaterasu|eo|Amaterasu|es|Amaterasu|et|Amaterasu|eu|Amaterasu|fa|آماتراسو|fi|Amaterasu|fr|Amaterasu|gl|Amaterasu|he|אמטראסו|hi|अमातेरसु|hr|Amaterasu|hu|Amateraszu Ómikami|hy|Ամատերասու Օմիկամի|id|Amaterasu|it|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|jaquote|アマテラス|jv|Amaterasu|ka|ამატერასუ|ko|아마테라스 오미카미|la|Amaterasu|lb|Amaterasu|lt|Amaterasu|lv|Amaterasu|min|Amaterasu|ml|അമതേരസു|mni|ꯑꯃꯇꯦꯔꯁꯨ ꯑꯣꯃꯤꯀꯃꯤ|ms|Amaterasu|nl|Amaterasu|nn|Amaterasu|no|Amaterasu|or|ଆମାତେରାଶୁ|pa|ਆਮਾਤੇਰਸ|pl|Amaterasu|pt|Amaterasu|ro|Amaterasu|ru|Аматэрасу|sco|Amaterasu|sh|Amaterasu|simple|Amaterasu Ōmikami|sk|Amaterasu Ómikami|sl|Amaterasu|sr|Аматерасу|su|Amaterasu|sv|Amaterasu|ta|அமதெரசு|th|อามาเตราซุ|tl|Amaterasu|tr|Amaterasu|uk|Аматерасу|uz|Amaterasu|vi|Amaterasu|wuu|天照大神|zh_min_nan|Amaterasu|zh_yue|天照大神|zh|天照大神|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} * {{ill|Q2564508|ltq=Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} * {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|lt=Ōjin|ar|الإمبراطور أوجين|arz|الامبراطور اوجين|azb|اوجین (ایمپیراتور)|bn|সম্রাট ওজিন|cs|Ódžin|de|Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|es|Ōjin Tennō|eu|Ōjin enperadorea|fa|امپراتور اوجین|fi|Ōjin|fr|Ōjin|hr|Ōjin|id|Kaisar Ōjin|it|Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|ka|ოძინი|ko|오진 천황|nl|Ojin|pl|Ōjin|pt|Ojin|ru|Император Одзин|sh|Car Ōjin|simple|Emperor Ōjin|sl|Cesar Odžin|sv|Ojin|th|จักรพรรดิโอจิง|tl|Emperador Ōjin|tr|Ōjin (imparator)|uk|Імператор Одзін|uz|Imperator Ōjin|vi|Thiên hoàng Ōjin|yo|Emperor Ōjin|zh_min_nan|Ôzin Thian-hông|zh_yue|應神天皇|zh|应神天皇|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181469 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いなさきじんじゃ * いなくまじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2180305000980 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県岡崎市稲熊町森下6', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:稲前神社]] {{wikidata link|Q22117916}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Inasaki Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Okazaki-Inasaki-Jinja-1.jpg|250px|Inasaki Shrine]]
Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Okazaki|Q242783|qid=Q242783|1=Okazaki, Aichi}}{{ill|lt=Inakuma-chō|Q17193389|qid=Q17193389|1=Inaguma-chō}}Morishita 6 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 58|緯度秒 = 12.20 |経度度 = 137|経度分 =10|経度秒 = 55.88 |位置 = |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}, {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}, {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Nara period|Q189178|qid=Q189178|1=Nara period}} |本殿 = |例祭 = |地図 = Japan Aichi }} [[File:Okazaki-Inasaki-Jinja-3.jpg|thumb|220px|right|Stone monument in the precincts of Inasaki Shrine]] [[File:Okazaki-Inasaki-Jinja-5.jpg|thumb|220px|right|Entrance]] '''Inasaki Shrine''' (いなくまじんじゃ / いなさきじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Morishita, {{ill|lt=Inakuma-chō|Q17193389|qid=Q17193389|1=Inaguma-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Okazaki|Q242783|qid=Q242783|1=Okazaki, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. It is said to be the oldest shrine in Okazaki{{Cite web|和書|url=https://okazaki-kanko.jp/point/506 | title=Inasaki Shrine |website=Okazaki Outing Navi |publisher=Okazaki City Tourism Association | accessdate=2022-01-05 }}. === Overview === Inasaki Shrine is regarded as one of the two Shikinaisha of {{ill|lt=Nukata District|Q787290|qid=Q787290|1=Nukata District}} in ancient {{ill|lt=Mikawa Province|Q768158|qid=Q768158|1=Mikawa Province}}, listed in volumes 9 and 10 of the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}' {{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=register of deities|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Its foundation is thought to date back to the {{ill|lt=Nara period|Q189178|qid=Q189178|1=Nara period}}, and in the "Mikawa Kokunai Shinmei Meichō," said to have formed from the late {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}} to the {{ill|lt=Kamakura period|Q236205|qid=Q236205|1=Kamakura period}}, it is recorded as "Junior Fifth Rank Lower, Inakuma Tenjin seated in {{ill|lt=Nukata District|Q787290|qid=Q787290|1=Nukata District}}." Part of Inakuma-gō is said to have been shrine territory of {{ill|lt=Ise Jingū|Q687168|qid=Q687168|1=Ise Grand Shrine}} for a period from the late medieval to early modern era. Therefore it can be inferred that the shrine had already been built by the time private landed estates ({{ill|lt=shōen|Q1887569|qid=Q1887569|1=Shōen}}) advanced{{Sfn|『岡崎 史跡と文化財めぐり』|p=69}}. Records say Inasaki Shrine was once on the site of {{ill|lt=Okazaki Castle|Q1013445|qid=Q1013445|1=Okazaki Castle}}, but when the Kō clan, who ruled Nukata, restored Sōji-ji, it was moved to {{ill|lt=Zaimoku-chō (Okazaki)|Q17224231|qid=Q17224231|lt=Zaimoku-chō|1=Zaimoku-chō, Okazaki}}. Later, in the {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} era ({{ill|lt=1573|Q6678|qid=Q6678|1=1573}}-{{ill|lt=1591|Q6766|qid=Q6766|1=1591}}), it was moved to Inakuma due to expansion of Okazaki Castle{{Sfn|『岡崎 史跡と文化財めぐり』|p=69}}. === Transportation === * {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|qid=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}}: get off at "Inakuma 2-chōme" stop bound for Ōnuma, then 100 meters north. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Bibliography === * {{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 1993-3-15 |title = New Edition, History of Okazaki City, General Volume 20 |publisher = New Edition History of Okazaki City Editorial Committee |page = 35-36 |isbn = }} * {{Cite book|和書 |author = |year = 2003-1-1 |title = Okazaki: Tour of Historic Sites and Cultural Properties |publisher = Okazaki City Hall |ref = {{SfnRef|『岡崎 史跡と文化財めぐり』}} }} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province|Q11356190|qid=Q11356190|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Inasaki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inasaki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Okazaki, Aichi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mikawa Province]]
